findingIds.note: When dependent op needs 'findingIds' param, use for_each=aws.macie.list_automated_discovery_accounts and set findingIds='{{ item.accountId }}'

groupBy.note: When dependent op needs 'groupBy' param, use for_each=aws.macie.list_resource_profile_detections and set groupBy='{{ item.count }}'

id.note: When dependent op needs 'id' param, use for_each=aws.macie.list_allow_lists and set id='{{ item.criteria }}'

jobId.note: When dependent op needs 'jobId' param, use for_each=aws.macie.list_classification_jobs and set jobId='{{ item.allowListIds }}'

resourceArn.note: When dependent op needs 'resourceArn' param, use for_each=aws.macie.list_allow_lists and set resourceArn='{{ item.arn }}'
